name: Gump
short_description: Doobies journey in the land of Gump
detailed_description: for kids. the game is free. all well-wishers and reviews are acknowledged. this game was made in spite of lot of trouble. it created a lot of false expectation. and a new game wasn't understood. the visual menu was to scroll over patiently rather than in high spirit. I'm glad you all agree the game is good. since you have to pay for a shooter game this game was made free. may be you have financial reasons. its a cartoon and enjoy the game.
